brand.mission: Make bankruptcy operations easy through live, automated tools that reduce compliance risk and effort at scale.
brand.audience: Lenders, servicers, bankruptcy operations teams, compliance leaders, and executives.
brand.voice: Restrained, highly credible, professional, protective, and proactive.
differentiators: Bankruptcy-only focus across collections, servicing, compliance, and recovery workflows.
Built to connect with other software, designed to fit existing servicing environments.
Coverage across all 94 United States Bankruptcy Courts.
Native Spectrum integration addresses the need to keep work inside the system teams already use.

communication.confirmed: Lead with operational protection, workflow continuity, credible product proof, and precise status labels. Avoid fear-driven bankruptcy imagery, unsupported absolutes, competitor names, and exact pricing.
communication.currentAcquisition: Needs confirmation. The approved memory does not document a complete current acquisition funnel, channel mix, conversion baseline, or account targets.
communication.recommendedAcquisition: Third i guidance: use the Shaw/Spectrum integration as focused proof for existing Spectrum users; build compliance-leader and servicing-operator education around native workflow continuity; add case-led product demonstrations only after live-function and CTA approval.

brand.source: bkWatch Design System and BankruptcyWatch factual canon — updated Jul 16, 2026

relationship.mission: Make bankruptcy operations easy through live, automated tools that reduce compliance risk and effort at scale.
relationship.summary: shaw-bkWatch is the active project. Its selected Final Demo is currently being built in the embedded project-page workspace above Creative Directions. This is demo production only; approval advances the same record into full-film production.
relationship.phase: Demo production — building the selected demo
relationship.source: shaw-bkWatch Working Memory and Final Demo Plan — Jul 16, 2026
